name_cn:
【New】Gucci Blondie Mini Shoulder
The new Gucci Blondie handbag features the brand's classic series logo, which first appeared in the early 1970s, cleverly combining heritage charm with contemporary style, perfectly interpreting the brand's classic design and modern essence. This mini shoulder bag is crafted from glossy leather and features an adjustable leather shoulder strap for crossbody wear. Black glossy leather, brown cotton-linen blend lining, circular interlocking double G, adjustable shoulder strap (47-57 cm height); length adjustable between 110 cm and 130 cm, zip closure, weight: approx. 350g, fits iPhone Max/Plus, AirPods, long wallet and lipstick.
Model: 820429.
Size: 21 (W) x 15.5 (H) x 8cm (D)
Color: Apricot fabric and brown leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy
